title: LM Studio server
description: Connect to a local LM Studio OpenAI-compatible server.

fields.label: Endpoint URL
fields.description: Base URL of LM Studio's server (Developer tab → Start Server). The plugin appends /v1/chat/completions and /v1/models; a trailing slash is normalized. If you point this at a different host:port, add it to permissions.network.allow too or the request is denied.

fields.label: Model
fields.placeholder: leave blank to use the loaded model
fields.description: Model id LM Studio routes to (e.g. qwen2.5-7b-instruct). Run listModels to discover ids. Leave blank to use whatever model is currently loaded.
